summary: Develop a content marketing strategy with topic clusters, editorial calendar, and distribution plan aligned to business goals.

inputs.name: business_goals
inputs.description: Primary business objectives the content should support.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Audience personas and their content needs.

inputs.name: existing_content
inputs.description: Current content inventory and performance data.

outputs.name: strategy_document
outputs.description: Core strategy with pillars, audience mapping, and goals.

outputs.name: editorial_calendar
outputs.description: Quarterly content plan with topics, formats, and cadence.

budget.notes: Focus on strategy alignment and actionable calendar.

gates.rule: Confirm the request is content strategy rather than ad copy or social posting.
Require business goals and target audience before strategy development.
Deliver strategy with pillars, calendar, and distribution plan.

steps.action: Define content pillars aligned with business goals and audience needs.
Map keyword clusters to content pillars and identify gaps.
Create editorial calendar with topics, formats, and publishing cadence.
Design channel-specific distribution and amplification strategy.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing content inventory and performance data.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Produce strategy document and editorial calendar.

verification.method: Check content pillars connect to business goals.
Check calendar has specific topics, formats, and dates.
Check distribution plan covers each content piece.

success_criteria: Strategy document connects content to business outcomes.
Editorial calendar is realistic and sustainable.
Distribution plan ensures content reaches target audience.

rollback.when: If pillars don't align with goals, revert to audience and goal definition.
